content:
### ⭐ NEW: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR (June 2026) — **TOP PRIORITY PRIMARY CANDIDATE**

**Overview**
600M-parameter Cache-Aware FastConformer-RNNT streaming ASR model by NVIDIA (OpenMDW-1.1 license, self-hostable). Native streaming with configurable chunks (80ms–1.12s), supporting 40 language-locales. Actively maintained as of June 2026.

**Performance**
- **WER (English batch):** 6.93% (vs. Granite 5.33%, Paraformer ~5.5–6%)
- **WER (English streaming, 1.12s chunks):** 7.91% (+0.98% degradation vs batch — excellent)
- **WER (Accented English, VoxPopuli):** 7.69%
- **P50 latency (H100):** 18ms per chunk → <800ms total feasible at 1.12s chunk size
- **RTF:** 258.9x (H100)
- **VRAM (batch=1):** 1.7 GB

**Domain Biasing & Entity Accuracy**
- ✅ **Word boosting:** Native support for domain vocabulary (SKUs, brand names, product names)
- ✅ **Domain fine-tuning:** Published recipes for accent/dialect/domain adaptation (estimated +2–5% entity accuracy improvement)
- ⚠️ Streaming mode limited to greedy_search (no beam search in streaming path)

**Integration**
- **NeMo Framework:** `ASRModel.from_pretrained("nvidia/nemotron-3.5-asr-streaming-0.6b")`
- **Production:** NVIDIA Riva NIM microservice (gRPC + HTTP/WebSocket)
- **Async Python:** `nvidia-riva-client` (PyPI) with async streaming buffers
- **PCM-16 mono:** ✅ Fully supported

**vs. Current Top-3**

| Aspect | Nemotron 3.5 | Granite 4.1 | Paraformer | Moonshine |
|--------|--------------|-------------|------------|----------|
| WER | 6.93% | 5.33% ✅ | ~5.5–6% | ~7.8% |
| Streaming native | ✅ | ❌ | ⚠️ Limited | ✅ (edge) |
| Domain biasing | ✅ Word boost | ❌ | ⚠️ Limited | ❌ |
| <800ms latency | ✅ | ❌ Batch only | ⚠️ | ✅ |
| Accented English | 7.69% | Unknown | Unknown | Unknown |
| Multilingual | ✅ 40 locales | Limited | Mandarin | Limited |

**Verdict:** Nemotron 3.5 is the **only streaming-native model meeting all brainpowa constraints** (native streaming, <800ms, domain biasing, self-hostable). Granite has lower WER but is batch-only, making it unsuitable for real-time voice commerce (<800ms requirement).

**Recommendation:** **TIER 1 — PRIMARY BENCHMARK CANDIDATE.** Benchmark on gold-92 immediately after Granite to validate entity accuracy vs. baseline. Production-ready deployments exist at scale (NVIDIA, Pipecat, LiveKit, E2E Networks as of June 2026).

**Sources:**
- HuggingFace Model Card: https://huggingface.co/nvidia/nemotron-3.5-asr-streaming-0.6b
- NVIDIA NeMo Docs: https://docs.nvidia.com/nemo-framework/
- NVIDIA NIM Speech: https://docs.nvidia.com/nim/speech/latest/
- arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.14493
- GitHub NeMo: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/NeMo
rationale: Nemotron 3.5 ASR (June 2026 release) was not included in the original t0005 research due to timing (survey completed June 24, model announced June 2026). Subsequent research reveals it is the only streaming-native ASR model meeting all brainpowa STTAdapter requirements, positioning it as a primary benchmark candidate ahead of Granite (batch-only, unsuitable for <800ms voice-to-action latency). Entity accuracy and streaming degradation remain to be validated on gold-92.
